# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud database security.
# Category: cloud_database_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure SQL Server
    defaultValue: "[concat('sqlserver-staging-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"

  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure SQL Database
    defaultValue: staging-appdb

  administratorLogin:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: SQL Server administrator login name
    minLength: 1

  administratorLoginPassword:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: SQL Server administrator password
    minLength: 12

  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources

  allowedDevIpAddresses:
    type: array
    metadata:
      description: Array of allowed development IP addresses with name and IP properties
    defaultValue: []

  aadAdminObjectId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Object ID of the Azure AD admin user or group

  aadAdminLogin:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Azure AD admin login name (user principal name or group name)

  aadAdminTenantId:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[subscription().tenantId]"
    metadata:
      description: Tenant ID for Azure AD admin

  enableVNetIntegration:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: false
    metadata:
      description: Enable VNet service endpoint integration

  vnetResourceGroupName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: ""
    metadata:
      description: Resource group of the VNet (if enableVNetIntegration is true)

  vnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: ""
    metadata:
      description: Name of the VNet (if enableVNetIntegration is true)

  subnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: ""
    metadata:
      description: Name of the subnet (if enableVNetIntegration is true)

  databaseSkuName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Basic
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - S0
      - S1
      - S2
      - GP_S_Gen5_1
      - GP_S_Gen5_2
    metadata:
      description: SKU name for the database

  databaseSkuTier:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Basic
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - Standard
      - GeneralPurpose
    metadata:
      description: SKU tier for the database

  databaseMaxSizeBytes:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 2147483648
    metadata:
      description: Maximum size of the database in bytes (default 2GB)

  logRetentionDays:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 90
    minValue: 1
    maxValue: 365
    metadata:
      description: Number of days to retain audit logs

  enableThreatDetection:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Enable Advanced Threat Protection

  threatDetectionEmailAddresses:
    type: array
    defaultValue: []
    metadata:
      description: Email addresses for threat detection alerts

  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[concat('sqlaudit', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
    metadata:
      description: Storage account name for audit logs

variables:
  allowAzureServicesFirewallRuleName: AllowAzureServices
  environmentTag: staging

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[variables('environmentTag')]"
      purpose: sql-audit-logs
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    kind: StorageV2
    properties:
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      minimumTlsVersion: TLS1_2
      allowBlobPublicAccess: false
      networkAcls:
        defaultAction: Deny
        bypass: AzureServices

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[variables('environmentTag')]"
      purpose: application-database
      managedBy: arm-template
    identity:
      type: SystemAssigned
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[parameters('administratorLogin')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]"
      version: "12.0"
      minimalTlsVersion: "1.2"
      publicNetworkAccess: Enabled
      restrictOutboundNetworkAccess: Disabled
      administrators:
        administratorType: ActiveDirectory
        azureADOnlyAuthentication: false
        login: "[parameters('aadAdminLogin')]"
        sid: "[parameters('aadAdminObjectId')]"
        tenantId: "[parameters('aadAdminTenantId')]"
        principalType: Group

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', variables('allowAzureServicesFirewallRuleName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: 0.0.0.0
      endIpAddress: 0.0.0.0

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/DevIP-', parameters('allowedDevIpAddresses')[copyIndex()].name)]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    copy:
      name: devIpFirewallRulesCopy
      count: "[length(parameters('allowedDevIpAddresses'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "[parameters('allowedDevIpAddresses')[copyIndex()].startIp]"
      endIpAddress: "[parameters('allowedDevIpAddresses')[copyIndex()].endIp]"

  - condition: "[parameters('enableVNetIntegration')]"
    type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/virtualNetworkRules
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/vnet-rule')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    properties:
      virtualNetworkSubnetId: "[if(parameters('enableVNetIntegration'), resourceId(parameters('vnetResourceGroupName'), 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName')), 'placeholder')]"
      ignoreMissingVnetServiceEndpoint: false

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[variables('environmentTag')]"
      purpose: application-database
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    sku:
      name: "[parameters('databaseSkuName')]"
      tier: "[parameters('databaseSkuTier')]"
    properties:
      collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      maxSizeBytes: "[parameters('databaseMaxSizeBytes')]"
      zoneRedundant: false
      requestedBackupStorageRedundancy: Local

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/transparentDataEncryption
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), '/current')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/backupShortTermRetentionPolicies
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
    properties:
      retentionDays: 14
      diffBackupIntervalInHours: 12

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/auditingSettings
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled
      storageEndpoint: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2023-01-01').primaryEndpoints.blob]"
      storageAccountAccessKey: "[listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2023-01-01').keys[0].value]"
      retentionDays: "[parameters('logRetentionDays')]"
      auditActionsAndGroups:
        - SUCCESSFUL_DATABASE_AUTHENTICATION_GROUP
        - FAILED_DATABASE_AUTHENTICATION_GROUP
        - BATCH_COMPLETED_GROUP
        - DATABASE_OBJECT_CHANGE_GROUP
        - DATABASE_PRINCIPAL_CHANGE_GROUP
        - SCHEMA_OBJECT_CHANGE_GROUP
        - DATABASE_PERMISSION_CHANGE_GROUP
        - DATABASE_OBJECT_PERMISSION_CHANGE_GROUP
      isStorageSecondaryKeyInUse: false
      isAzureMonitorTargetEnabled: true

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/auditingSettings
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled
      storageEndpoint: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2023-01-01').primaryEndpoints.blob]"
      storageAccountAccessKey: "[listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2023-01-01').keys[0].value]"
      retentionDays: "[parameters('logRetentionDays')]"
      auditActionsAndGroups:
        - SUCCESSFUL_DATABASE_AUTHENTICATION_GROUP
        - FAILED_DATABASE_AUTHENTICATION_GROUP
        - BATCH_COMPLETED_GROUP
        - DATABASE_OBJECT_CHANGE_GROUP
      isAzureMonitorTargetEnabled: true

  - condition: "[parameters('enableThreatDetection')]"
    type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/securityAlertPolicies
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/Default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled
      emailAddresses: "[parameters('threatDetectionEmailAddresses')]"
      emailAccountAdmins: true
      retentionDays: "[parameters('logRetentionDays')]"
      storageEndpoint: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2023-01-01').primaryEndpoints.blob]"
      storageAccountAccessKey: "[listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2023-01-01').keys[0].value]"

  - condition: "[parameters('enableThreatDetection')]"
    type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/vulnerabilityAssessments
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/securityAlertPolicies', parameters('sqlServerName'), 'Default')]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      storageContainerPath: "[concat(reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2023-01-01').primaryEndpoints.blob, 'vulnerability-assessment')]"
      storageAccountAccessKey: "[listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2023-01-01').keys[0].value]"
      recurringScans:
        isEnabled: true
        emailSubscriptionAdmins: true
        emails: "[parameters('threatDetectionEmailAddresses')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/connectionPolicies
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    properties:
      connectionType: Redirect

outputs:
  sqlServerFqdn:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"

  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"

  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"

  sqlServerResourceId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"

  connectionStringFormat:
    type: string
    value: "[concat('Server=tcp:', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName, ',1433;Database=', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), ';Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;')]"

  securityNote:
    type: string
    value: "Use Azure AD authentication where possible. SQL admin credentials should be rotated regularly and stored in Azure Key Vault. Consider enabling Azure AD-only authentication after initial setup."
